message:
feat(engine): expand 18 source modules and add 16 deep/enrichment integration test suites

Source module expansions (18 modules):
- budgeted_synthesis_engine, causal_intervention_dag,
  claim_envelope_contract, entropic_policy_morphing,
  esm_cjs_interop_parity, frankenlab_release_gate_promotion,
  lowering_pipeline, metadata_substrate_governance,
  npm_compatibility_matrix, proof_backed_compression,
  quickening_feedback_lattice, react_mismatch_catalog,
  resource_certificate_governance, semantic_cover_schema,
  ts_resolution_manifest, zero_placeholder_scan,
  aara_resource_consumer, franken_security_conformance_runner

New enrichment integration tests (5 files):
- benchmark_coverage_saturation_enrichment_integration.rs
- bifurcation_boundary_scanner_enrichment_integration.rs
- bounded_feedback_controller_enrichment_integration.rs
- capability_pruned_dispatch_enrichment_integration.rs
- claim_atom_lattice_enrichment_integration.rs

Expanded deep integration tests (11 files):
- claim_envelope_contract_deep, evidence_contract_deep,
  execution_orchestrator, monitor_scheduler_deep,
  operator_diagnostic_contract_deep, queueing_admission_control_deep,
  regime_signature_feature_deep, resource_certificate_governance_deep,
  runtime_image_contract_deep, security_conformance_runner_cli,
  semantic_flattening_inventory_deep, tier_up_profiler_deep

Beads tracker: sync issue state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     workload_id: String,
     corpus: String,
     attack_taxonomy: Option<String>,
@@ -227,6 +230,7 @@ fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn Error>> {
 
     let mut lines = String::new();
     let summary = &evaluation.summary;
+    let environment_fingerprint = environment_fingerprint();
     let summary_line = SecuritySummaryLine {
         schema_version: SECURITY_CONFORMANCE_SCHEMA_VERSION.to_string(),
         trace_id: deterministic_trace_id(&run_id, "summary"),
@@ -247,7 +251,7 @@ fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn Error>> {
         run_id: run_id.clone(),
         corpus_manifest_hash: summary.corpus_manifest_hash.clone(),
         policy_snapshot_hash: args.policy_snapshot_hash.clone(),
-        environment_fingerprint: environment_fingerprint(),
+        environment_fingerprint: environment_fingerprint.clone(),
         benign_total: summary.benign_total,
         malicious_total: summary.malicious_total,
         true_positive_count: summary.true_positive_count,
@@ -285,6 +289,9 @@ fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn Error>> {
             event: "workload_result".to_string(),
             outcome: outcome.to_string(),
             error_code: observation.error_code.clone(),
+            corpus_manifest_hash: summary.corpus_manifest_hash.clone(),
+            policy_snapshot_hash: args.policy_snapshot_hash.clone(),
+            environment_fingerprint: environment_fingerprint.clone(),
             workload_id: record.label.workload_id.clone(),
             corpus: match record.label.corpus {
                 SecurityCorpus::Benign => "benign".to_string(),

@@ -4,8 +4,8 @@
 //! evaluation verdicts, tier serde roundtrips, and verdict classification.
 
 use frankenengine_engine::claim_envelope_contract::{

 };

@@ -199,7 +199,9 @@ fn deep_evaluate_publishable_scoped_all_met() {

         scenario_id: "deep-scoped-pass".to_string(),
         requested_class: ClaimEnvelopeTier::PublishableScoped,

+                .to_string(),
         declared_scope_complete: true,
         declared_board_complete: true,
         evidence_complete: true,
